titles.title: Without a Doubt I Am Saved

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once I served the Lord only with my lips And I put all my trust in my church membership And in my soul I was lost, earnestly I prayed Till I knew without a doubt I’m Saved

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Without a doubt I’m saved I have been born again Washed In calvary’s flow pure and white within. Though I once was lost Sin had chained me a slave But now I know without a doubt I’m saved.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a deep settled peace in my happy soul My life has an aim heaven is my goal And the world’s gathering storms Cannot make me afraid And now I know without a doubt I’m saved.
